title: cola duparquetiana
intro: Cola duparquetiana, also known as the Ivorie Cola, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cola duparquetiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparation of Cola duparquetiana is typically made by drying and powdering the roots, which can be used in tea or capsule form to reap its medicinal benefits.
